description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with a lush rooftop garden, blending contemporary architecture with green design. The exterior is composed of clean, geometric lines, with a mix of white and wood-textured panels, and several circular and rectangular windows providing visual interest. The property is surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with a variety of trees and shrubs, creating a private and inviting atmosphere. A paved driveway leads to the main entrance, and a swimming pool is visible in the backyard area. The structure appears to be single-story with an open, spacious layout, and large glass doors or windows that connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, sustainability, and integration with nature.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a rooftop garden, wood and white panel exterior, landscaped yard, and a swimming pool. The design features geometric windows and a blend of natural and contemporary elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bungalow, rooftop garden, geometric windows, and landscaped fence.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pool area, extensive rooftop greenery, and additional windows.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back entrance, garage area, and the continuation of the rooftop garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with scattered circular and rectangular windows
